role_at_1906_yoho: Graduating/active founding member of Alpine Club of Canada; official club photographer

fonds.institution: Whyte Museum of the Canadian Rockies
fonds.scope: Photographic negatives, prints, postcards; scenic and panoramic views of Canadian Rockies; Alpine Club of Canada camp documentation
fonds.findings: ONE confirmed 1906 material located: V263/NA-149 'Yoho, misc.' — negative of Alpine Club of Canada camp at Summit Lake, Yoho, dated [1906]. Additional Harmon camp images in fonds are dated 1910 and 1914 (Upper Yoho Glacier camps). Total of 27 search results for 'harmon 1906' spanning multiple media types.
fonds.notes: Harmon was founding member of ACC in 1906 and attended inaugural camp at Yoho Pass. His photographic business in Banff (1903-1942) produced the dominant visual record of Canadian Rockies. Whyte holds his complete archival legacy.

fonds.findings: Not systematically searched; LAC known to hold scattered Harmon images per research leads
fonds.notes: Requires direct contact or institutional navigation to specific collections
